name: Washington Transportation

Washington Depot, CT school transport is served by All-Star Transportation (Waterbury-based contractor) for Region 12 schools, not by this PO-box entity. Possibly a small CT livery permit holder; not confirmed on CT DOT general livery list in our results.

name: Anytime Anywhere Trnsprtn
recent_news: Anytime Anywhere Transportation Services, Inc. incorporated in Kansas in 2009; NPI-registered (1336383462) as a Secured Medical Transport (Van) provider. Manta-style listings show ~$103K revenue and ~1 staff. No school district contracts surfaced.
fit_notes: Not a fit. NEMT/Medicaid van provider, not a school-bus or SPED route contractor. USD 259 (Wichita Public Schools) is served by First Student/EverDriven. Skip.
